{# find_by_part.html — MPN search for vendor discovery. Receives: mpn (str or None), results (list of dicts), hx_target, push_url_base. Called by: htmx_views.py find_by_part_partial route. Depends on: brand palette, HTMX, Alpine.js. #}
{# MPN Search Bar #}
{# Results #} {% if mpn and results %}

Vendors for {{ mpn }} ({{ results|length }} found)

{% for r in results %} {% endfor %}
Vendor Times Seen Last Price Last Qty Last Seen Win Rate Resp Time
{{ r.vendor_name }} {% if r.is_affinity %} Vendor Match {% endif %} {% if r.is_affinity %} {{ "%.0f%%"|format(r.affinity_confidence * 100) }} {% else %} {{ r.times_seen }} {% endif %} {{ "$%.4f"|format(r.last_price) if r.last_price else "—" }} {{ "{:,}".format(r.last_qty) if r.last_qty else "—" }} {{ r.last_seen|timeago if r.last_seen else "—" }} {% if r.win_rate is not none %}{{ "%.0f%%"|format(r.win_rate * 100) }}{% else %}—{% endif %} {% if r.avg_response_hours is not none %}{{ "%.1fh"|format(r.avg_response_hours) }}{% else %}—{% endif %}
{% elif mpn %}

No vendors found for {{ mpn }}

{% else %}
